page_content:
MUSC688 Advanced Orchestration (3 Credits) Orchestration projects in the styles of Debussy, Ravel, Stravinsky, Schoenberg, Bartok, and others. Prerequisite: MUSC487; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department. Additional Information: May be repeated once for credit.

MUSC689 Advanced Conducting (2 Credits) A concentrated study of the conducting techniques involved in the repertoire of all historical periods. Prerequisite: MUSC491; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department. Additional Information: May be repeated for credit with permission of instructor.

MUSC698 Advanced Seminar in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits) Advanced Seminar on topics that change every semester. Requires well- developed skills in musical and social analysis, mastery of theories and methods of ethnomusicology. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Credit Only Granted for: MUET689 or MUSC698. Formerly: MUET689.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

MUSC699 Selected Topics in Music (1-3 Credits) Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
